title: Using wave packet decompositions to construct function spaces: a user guide
summary: We survey the construction of a range of function spaces used in harmonic analysis of PDE, including classical results as well as recent developments. We frame these constructions in a common conceptual framework, where these function spaces arise as retracts of simple function spaces over phase space, through a projection associated with a wave packet decomposition. Finding appropriate function spaces to study a given PDE then consists in choosing a relevant wave packet decomposition. We provide a user guide to making such choices, and constructing the corresponding function spaces. This is done mostly by surveying recent constructions, but we also include a new construction, adapted to Schrödinger operators of the form $Δ- V$ for $V \geq 0$, as a sneak peek into upcoming joint work with Dorothee Frey, Andrew Morris, and Adam Sikora.

AI.tldr: 该论文提供了一个统一的框架，通过波包分解构造调和分析与PDE中使用的函数空间。
AI.motivation: 调和分析与偏微分方程研究中需要各种函数空间，但传统构造方法分散且缺乏统一框架。本文旨在提供一个共同的概念框架，将不同函数空间统一为相空间中简单函数空间的收缩，通过波包分解的投影来构造。
AI.techniques: 波包分解理论、相空间分析、函数空间的收缩构造方法、投影算子技术、调和分析中的空间插值和外推方法。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 建立了统一的框架：各种函数空间可视为相空间中简单函数空间通过波包分解投影的收缩；2. 提供了选择适当波包分解和构造对应函数空间的实用指南；3. 提出了针对形式为Δ-V（V≥0）的薛定谔算子的新构造方法。
AI.significance: 为调和分析与PDE中的函数空间理论提供了统一视角，简化了空间构造过程，为研究特定PDE选择合适函数空间提供了系统方法，对调和分析、PDE理论和数学物理有重要理论意义。

title: A note on exterior stability of finite time singularity formation for nonlinear wave equations
summary:
We study the stability of the exterior of Type I and Type II singularity formation for the wave maps equation in $\mathbb{R}^{d+1}$ with $d\geq2$ and the power nonlinear wave equation in $\mathbb{R}^{d+1}$ with $d\geq3$: Given characteristic initial data on the backwards lightcone of the singularity $\mathcal{C}=\{t+r=0\}$ converging to the singular background solution along with suitable data on an outgoing cone, we establish existence in a region $\{t+r\in(0,v_1),t-r\in(-1,0)\}$ for some suitably small $v_1$, i.e. all the way to the Cauchy horizon. Our result hinges on a particular set of assumptions on the regularity properties of these initial data and is therefore conjectural on the behaviour inside the lightcone.
  The proof goes via a suitable change of coordinates and an application of the scattering result of [KK25], which, in particular, also applies to scaling-critical potentials.
  In the case of the wave maps equation, we only provide the proof in the corotational symmetry class, but we also sketch how to lift this restriction.

AI.tldr: 建立了波映射方程和幂次非线性波方程在奇点形成外部区域的稳定性，证明解可以一直延伸到柯西视界。
AI.motivation: 研究波映射方程和幂次非线性波方程在奇点形成后的稳定性问题，特别是奇点外部区域的解行为，这对于理解非线性波方程的奇点结构具有重要意义。
AI.techniques: 采用坐标变换和散射理论方法，特别是应用[KK25]的散射结果来处理尺度临界势能，在波映射方程中主要考虑共旋转对称类。
AI.main_theorems: 在给定特征初始数据收敛于奇异背景解的条件下，在区域{t+r∈(0,v₁),t-r∈(-1,0)}中建立了解的存在性，可以一直延伸到柯西视界。
AI.significance: 为理解非线性波方程奇点形成后的稳定性提供了重要结果，特别是证明了在奇点外部区域解可以延伸到柯西视界，对奇点形成理论有重要贡献。

title: Hotspot formation driven by temperature-dependent coefficients in one-dimensional thermoviscoelasticity
summary: This manuscript is concerned with a two-component evolution system generalizing the classical model for one-dimensional thermoviscoelastic dynamics in Kelvin-Voigt materials in the presence of temperature-dependent viscosities and elastic stiffnesses. Under suitable assumptions on the growth of these ingredients and on the initial data, the occurrence of finite-time blow-up with respect to the $L^\infty$ norm in the temperature variable is discovered.

AI.tldr: 证明了具有温度依赖粘性和弹性刚度的热粘弹性系统在适当条件下温度变量会在有限时间内爆破
AI.motivation: 研究具有温度依赖粘性和弹性刚度的Kelvin-Voigt材料一维热粘弹性动力学模型，探索温度变量在有限时间内爆破的现象
AI.techniques: 使用能量估计、比较原理、非线性分析技术，处理温度依赖的粘性和弹性系数
AI.main_theorems: 在适当的增长条件和初始数据假设下，证明了温度变量在L∞范数意义下会在有限时间内发生爆破
AI.significance: 揭示了温度依赖材料参数对热粘弹性系统动力学行为的重要影响，为材料失效和热力学不稳定性提供了理论分析

title: Large-data global solutions to a quasilinear model for viscuos acoustic wave propagation in a non-isothermal setting
summary:
The manuscript considers the model for conversion of mechanical energy into heat during acoustic wave propagation in the presence of temperature-dependent elastic parameters, as given by \[
  \left\{ \begin{array}{l}
  u_{tt} = (γ(Θ) u_{xt})_x + a (γ(Θ) u_x)_x, \\[1mm]
  Θ_t = DΘ_{xx} + γ(Θ) u_{xt}^2.
  \end{array} \right.
  \qquad \qquad (\star) \] It is firstly shown that when considered along with no-flux boundary conditions in an open bounded real interval $Ω$, under the assumption that $γ\in C^2([0,\infty))$ is such that $γ>0$ and $γ'\ge 0$ on $[0,\infty)$ as well as \[
  D\cdot (γ+D) \cdot γ'' + 2γγ'^2 \le 0
  \qquad \mbox{on } [0,\infty), \] for all suitably regular initial data this problem admits a globally defined classical solution. This complements recent findings in the literature, according to which ($\star$) may admit solutions blowing up in finite time whenever $γ$ is positive and nondecreasing on $[0,\infty)$ with $\int_0^\infty \frac{dξ}{γ(ξ)} < \infty$.
  Apart from that, it is found that if the additional assumption \[
  a|Ω|^2 \le \frac{π^2 γ(0)}{1+\sqrt{1+\frac{γ(0)}{D}}} \] is satisfied, the all these solutions stabilize toward some spatially homogeneous equilibrium in the large time limit.

AI.tldr: 建立了温度依赖弹性参数下声波传播能量转换模型的全局经典解存在性和长时间渐近稳定性
AI.motivation: 研究声波传播中机械能转化为热能的模型，该模型包含温度依赖的弹性参数，旨在理解此类耦合系统的全局动力学行为，特别是解决文献中发现的有限时间爆破解问题
AI.techniques: 使用能量估计方法、Sobolev空间理论、非线性抛物-双曲耦合系统的分析技术，以及特定的结构条件来保证全局解存在性
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在γ满足C²正则性、正性、单调性及特定结构条件时，系统存在全局经典解；2. 在附加的小振幅条件下，所有解在长时间极限下趋于空间齐次平衡态
AI.significance: 为温度依赖弹性参数的声热耦合系统提供了全局适定性理论，揭示了避免有限时间爆破的结构条件，对理解物理系统中的能量耗散机制有重要意义

title: Local strong solutions in a quasilinear Moore-Gibson-Thompson type model for thermoviscoelastic evolution in a standard linear solid
summary:
This manuscript is concerned with the evolution system \[
  \left\{ \begin{array}{l}
  u_{ttt} + αu_{tt} = \big(γ(Θ) u_{xt}\big)_x + \big( \widehatγ(Θ) u_x\big)_x,
  Θ_t = D Θ_{xx} + Γ(Θ) u_{xt}^2,
  \end{array} \right. \] which arises as a simplified model for heat generation during acoustic wave propagation in a one-dimensional viscoelastic medium of standard linear solid type.
  Under the assumptions that $D>0$ and $α\ge 0$, and that $γ, \widehatγ$ and $Γ$ are sufficiently smooth with $γ>0, \widehatγ>0$ and $Γ\ge 0$ on $[0,\infty)$, for suitably regular initial data a statement on local existence and uniqueness of solutions in an associated Neumann problem is derived in a suitable framework of strong solvability.

AI.tldr: 建立了热声耦合非线性演化系统的局部适定性理论
AI.motivation: 研究一维标准线性固体型粘弹性介质中声波传播时热生成现象的简化模型，该模型描述了热与声的耦合演化过程
AI.techniques: 使用强可解性框架，基于能量估计和不动点定理，处理非线性耦合项和Neumann边界条件
AI.main_theorems: 在D>0、α≥0、γ>0、\widehatγ>0、Γ≥0等条件下，对足够正则的初始数据，证明了相关Neumann问题解在强可解性框架下的局部存在唯一性
AI.significance: 为热声耦合系统建立了严格的数学基础，为后续研究全局存在性、稳定性等性质提供了理论框架

title: On a Mathematical Model Describing Chemotherapeutic Drug Treatment for Tumor Cells
summary: In this paper, we study a semilinear parabolic PDE system which describes the interaction of normal cells, tumor cells, immune cells, with a chemotherapeutic drug. The model extends the previous model with incorporating strong Allee affects in the normal-tissue and tumor dynamics. Under mild assumptions, we establish global-in-time existence and uniqueness of nonnegative weak solutions and derive L-infinity bounds for all time. We then investigate spatiotemporal dynamics of the model and therapy scheduling using an implicit Crank Nicolson Backward Euler (CNBE) scheme. Simulations in a heterogeneous two-dimensional space-dimensional tissue region with three tumor peaks indicate rapid tumor invasion without treatment and significant tumor suppression under pulsed chemotherapeutic treatment. Moreover, in a fixed total dose delivered within the treatment cycle, while keeping each injection duration fixed, concentrated pulses produce stronger early knock-down of tumor density, while more frequent but gentler pulses achieve comparable control of the tumor invasive front while better preserving normal tissue over a four-week period.

AI.tldr: 建立了包含强Allee效应的肿瘤-免疫-化疗药物相互作用模型的全局弱解存在唯一性，并通过数值模拟研究了脉冲化疗策略对肿瘤抑制的影响。
AI.motivation: 研究正常细胞、肿瘤细胞、免疫细胞与化疗药物相互作用的半线性抛物型PDE系统，扩展了先前模型，加入了正常组织和肿瘤动力学中的强Allee效应，旨在分析化疗治疗策略对肿瘤抑制的效果。
AI.techniques: 使用弱解理论建立全局存在唯一性，推导L∞估计，采用隐式Crank Nicolson Backward Euler (CNBE)格式进行数值模拟，在异质二维组织区域进行仿真。
AI.main_theorems: 在温和假设下，建立了非负弱解的全局存在唯一性，推导了所有时间的L∞有界性，并通过数值模拟展示了脉冲化疗对肿瘤抑制的时空动态。
AI.significance: 为包含Allee效应的肿瘤-免疫-化疗相互作用模型提供了严格的数学分析框架，揭示了脉冲化疗策略的优化设计：集中脉冲早期抑制肿瘤密度更强，而更频繁的温和脉冲在控制肿瘤侵袭前沿的同时能更好地保护正常组织。

title: The Existence, uniqueness, and regularity of weak solutions for a thermodynamically consistent two-phase flow model in porous media
summary: Thermodynamically consistent models for two-phase flow in porous media have attracted significant attention in recent years. In this paper, we prove the existence, uniqueness and regularity of the weak solution to such a recent model proposed in [25,35]. To this end, firstly, we introduce a fully implicit time semi-discrete approximation and a fully discrete approximation for an appropriate weak formulation of the thermodynamically consistent model. Next, by using the zeros of a vector field theorem, we prove the existence of the weak solution for the fully discrete approximation. Then the existence of weak solutions for the fully implicit time semi-discrete approximation and the weak formulation of the model are derived by the weak convergence technique and the energy stability estimate. Subsequently, by the Gr{\" o}nwall inequality, we prove the uniqueness result under the smoothness assumption on the chemical potential. Finally, combined with the regularity theory of elliptic partial differential equations (PDE), the regularity of the weak solution for the model with complete Neumann boundary conditions is established.

AI.tldr: 证明了热力学一致多孔介质两相流模型弱解的存在性、唯一性和正则性
AI.motivation: 热力学一致的多孔介质两相流模型近年来受到广泛关注，但缺乏严格的数学分析，本文旨在填补这一理论空白
AI.techniques: 全隐式时间半离散近似、全离散近似、向量场零点定理、弱收敛技术、能量稳定性估计、Grönwall不等式、椭圆PDE正则性理论
AI.main_theorems: 证明了热力学一致两相流模型弱解的存在性、唯一性和正则性，建立了全离散近似解的存在性，推导了半离散近似和原始模型弱解的存在性
AI.significance: 为热力学一致多孔介质两相流模型提供了严格的数学理论基础，建立了数值分析框架，对渗流力学和计算流体力学有重要意义

title: Existence and Spatial Decay of Forced Waves for the Fisher-KPP Equation with a Degenerate Shifting Environment
summary:
This paper studies forced waves for the heterogeneous Fisher-KPP equation $u_t = u_{xx} + u(a(x-ct)-u)$, where $c>0$ and $a(z)>0$ satisfies $a(-\infty)=α>0=a(+\infty)$, $a'(z)\le0$ ($z\gg1$). Using ODE asymptotic analysis, we classify all local positive solutions near $z=+\infty$. Exponential decay solutions always exist; non-exponential decay solutions exist if and only if $\mathrm{e}^{-\frac{1}{c}\int_{z_0}^z a(s)ds}\in L^1$ (or equivalently, when $a(z)$ decays slower than a critical algebraic rate).
  We establish a complete existence, multiplicity and spatial decay theory for forced waves. For each $c\in(0,2\sqrtα)$, there exists a unique exponentially decaying forced wave. This wave is either the unique forced wave or the minimal forced wave, depending on the integrability condition. In the super-critical case $\mathrm{e}^{-\frac{1}{c}\int_{z_0}^z a(s)ds}\in L^1$, for any $c>0$ there exist infinitely many non-exponentially decaying forced waves. The maximal wave is not in $L^1$, and for nearly all such $a(z)$ we establish the existence, multiplicity and precise decay of these waves.
  These results provide nearly complete answers to open problems concerning the existence, uniqueness, multiplicity and spatial decay rates of forced waves in Fisher-KPP models with degenerate moving environments.

AI.tldr: 建立了异质Fisher-KPP方程强迫波的存在性、多重性和空间衰减的完整理论
AI.motivation: 研究具有退化移动环境的Fisher-KPP方程中的强迫波，解决关于存在性、唯一性、多重性和空间衰减率的开放问题
AI.techniques: ODE渐近分析、积分条件分析、临界代数衰减率分类
AI.main_theorems: 1. 对c∈(0,2√α)存在唯一指数衰减强迫波；2. 在超临界情况下存在无穷多非指数衰减强迫波；3. 建立了强迫波的完整分类理论
AI.significance: 为退化移动环境中的反应扩散方程提供了完整的强迫波理论，解决了该领域的开放问题，具有重要的理论意义

title: Nonexistence of pure bubble type II blow-up solutions to energy critical wave equation in the 3D radial case
summary: In this work we consider the focusing, energy-critical wave equation in 3D radial case. According to the soliton resolution conjecture, which has been verified in the radial case, any type II blow-up solution decomposes into a superposition of several decoupled grounds states, a free wave and a small error, as time tends to the blow-up time. We prove that there does not exist any pure bubble type II blow up solutions. In other words, the free wave part is never zero in the soliton resolution of type II blow-up solutions, regardless of the bubble number.

AI.tldr: 证明了在3D径向聚焦能量临界波动方程中，不存在纯气泡型II类爆破解，即II类爆破解的孤立子分解中自由波部分永不消失
AI.motivation: 研究3D径向聚焦能量临界波动方程的II类爆破解结构，验证孤立子分解猜想在径向情况下的具体性质，特别是探讨是否存在纯气泡型（无自由波部分）的II类爆破解
AI.techniques: 利用径向对称性，基于已验证的孤立子分解猜想，通过分析II类爆破解的能量分解结构，采用反证法和能量守恒原理
AI.main_theorems: 主要定理：在3D径向聚焦能量临界波动方程中，不存在纯气泡型II类爆破解，即任何II类爆破解的孤立子分解中自由波部分必须非零
AI.significance: 深化了对能量临界波动方程爆破机制的理解，揭示了II类爆破解结构的刚性特征，为完全分类爆破解提供了重要约束条件

title: Global Regularity for Non-resistive or Non-viscous MHD System on the Torus
summary: In this paper, we establish the global well-posedness of the incompressible magnetohydrodynamics (MHD) system on $n-$dimensional $(n\geq 2)$ periodic boxes with either no magnetic diffusivity (non-resistive case) or no fluid viscosity (non-viscous case) under assumption that initial magnetic fields are sufficiently close to the background magnetic field ${\bf e}_n=(0,\cdots,0,1)$. In Eulerian coordinates, we develop novel time-weighted energy estimates and commutator estimates involving Riesz transforms in negative Sobolev spaces to handle two distinct dissipation cases under different initial symmetry assumptions. The analysis becomes much more difficult and delicate in three- or higher-dimensional cases. In particular, for the three-dimensional and non-resistive case, compared with the regularity requirement proposed by Pan, Zhou and Zhu {\it [Arch. Ration. Mech. Anal. 2018]}, our result relaxes it from $H^{11}(\mathbb{T}^3)$ to $H^{\frac{9}{2}+}(\mathbb{T}^3)$. And we further establish precise decay rates and growth bounds for both $u(t)$ and $\partial_n(u(t),b(t))$ in Sobolev norms. For the three-dimensional and non-viscous case, we prove the first nonlinear stability result near the background field $\mathbf{e}_3 = (0,0,1)$. This sharply contrasts with the recent blow-up results on the 3D incompressible Euler equations by Elgindi {\it [Ann. Math. 2021]}, Chen-Hou {\it [Commun. Math. Phys. 2021]} and by Chen-Hou {\it [arXiv:2210.07191]}. Our results show that, under certain symmetry assumptions, magnetic fields near the background field provide enhanced dissipations and suppress potential blow-up mechanisms in non-viscous MHD system.

AI.tldr: 建立了接近背景磁场时无磁扩散或无粘性MHD系统的全局适定性，揭示了磁场对抑制奇异的增强耗散作用
AI.motivation: 研究无磁扩散或无粘性的磁流体动力学(MHD)系统在接近背景磁场时的全局适定性问题，旨在理解磁场如何抑制流体奇异性形成
AI.techniques: 发展了含Riesz变换的时间加权能量估计和交换子估计，在负Sobolev空间中处理不同耗散情形，利用初始对称性假设简化分析
AI.main_theorems: 1. 三维非电阻情形：将正则性要求从H¹¹降低到H^{9/2+}；2. 三维非粘性情形：首次证明了接近背景磁场的非线性稳定性；3. 建立了u(t)和∂_n(u(t),b(t))的精确衰减率和增长界
AI.significance: 揭示了磁场在抑制流体奇异性中的关键作用，为理解MHD系统的正则性机制提供了新视角，与Euler方程的爆破结果形成鲜明对比

title: On the Cauchy problem to the axially-symmetric solutions to the Navier-Stokes equations
summary: We consider the Cauchy problem to the axisymmetric Navier-Stokes equations. To prove an existence of global regular solutions we examine the Navier-Stokes equations near the axis of symmetry and far from it separately. We derive only a global a priori estimate. To show it near the axis of symmetry we need the energy estimate, $L_\infty$-estimate for swirl, $H^2$ and $H^3$ estimates for the modified stream function (stream function divided by radius) and also expansions of velocity and modified stream function found by Liu-Wang. The estimate for solutions far from the axis of symmetry follows easily. Hence, having so regular solutions that Liu-Wang expansions hold we have the global a priori estimate $(Ω=\mathbb{R}^3)$ $$ \|ω_{r/r} \|_{V(Ω^t)} + \|ω_{\varphi/r}\|_{V(Ω^t)}\leφ({\rm data}),\ \ t<\infty, \qquad(*) $$ where $ω_r$ is the radiar component of vorticity, $ω_\varphi$ the angular, $V(Ω^t)$ is the energy norm. Estimate $(*)$ can be treated as an a priori estimate derived on sufficiently regular solutions. Increasing regularity of solutions $(*)$ we derive the estimate $$\eqalign{ &\|v\|_{W_3^{3,3/2}(Ω^t)}+\|\nabla p\|_{W_3^{1,1/2}(Ω^t)}\cr &\leφ(φ({\rm data}),\|f\|_{W_3^{1,1/2}(Ω^t)},\|v(0)\|_{W_3^{3-2/3}(Ω)}),\cr} \qquad(**) $$ where $φ$ is an increasing positive function. The estimate is proved on the local solution. Estimate $(**)$ plus existence of local solutions imply the existence of global regular solutions to the Cauchy problem.

AI.tldr: 证明了轴对称Navier-Stokes方程Cauchy问题全局正则解的存在性
AI.motivation: 研究轴对称Navier-Stokes方程的全局正则性问题，这是Navier-Stokes方程千禧年难题的核心问题之一，特别是在三维情况下全局正则解的存在性证明具有重要理论意义。
AI.techniques: 将问题分解为靠近对称轴和远离对称轴两部分处理；使用能量估计、旋度分量的L∞估计、修正流函数的H²和H³估计；利用Liu-Wang展开式；建立先验估计并提升正则性。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了两个关键先验估计：(*) 旋度分量的能量范数估计；(**) 速度和压力梯度的更高正则性估计；结合局部解的存在性证明了全局正则解的存在性。
AI.significance: 为轴对称Navier-Stokes方程的全局正则性问题提供了新的证明方法，推进了对Navier-Stokes方程正则性理论的理解，为解决更一般的三维Navier-Stokes方程正则性问题提供了技术思路。

title: Derivation of the Boltzmann equation from hard-sphere dynamics (after Y. Deng, Z. Hani, and X. Ma)
summary: Consider a microscopic system of $N$ hard spheres that are initially independent (modulo the exclusion condition on particle positions) and identically distributed in $\mathbb{R}^3$. When the number $N$ of particles goes to infinity and the diameter $\varepsilon$ of the particles goes to zero, and under the weak density assumption $N\varepsilon^2=1$, it has been known since the work of Lanford that the empirical measure for the particles converges to the solution of the Boltzmann equation in a short time interval. In particular, the particles remain dynamically independent, in this limit and in the short time interval where the correlations induced by their collisions remain under control. In a recent work, Y. Deng, Z. Hani and X. Ma successfully obtained the same convergence result in arbitrary large time; more precisely, the convergence result holds for any time interval on which the Boltzmann equation has a regular solution. In this note, we explain a few elements of their proof.

AI.tldr: 解释了Deng-Hani-Ma关于硬球系统在任意长时间尺度下收敛到Boltzmann方程解的证明关键要素
AI.motivation: 研究硬球系统在长时间尺度下的动力学行为，突破Lanford短时间收敛的限制，建立微观系统与宏观Boltzmann方程在任意长时间尺度下的对应关系
AI.techniques: 使用BBGKY层级展开、碰撞树展开、相关函数控制、组合分析、概率方法处理长时间尺度下的碰撞相关性累积
AI.main_theorems: 在Boltzmann方程存在正则解的时间区间内，硬球系统的经验测度收敛到Boltzmann方程的解，突破了传统短时间限制
AI.significance: 首次建立了硬球系统在任意长时间尺度下到Boltzmann方程的收敛性，为从微观动力学推导宏观输运方程提供了完整的数学基础

title: Interpretation of stochastic primitive equations with relaxed hydrostatic assumption as a higher order approximation of 3D stochastic Navier-Stokes
summary: In this paper, we investigate the convergence of solutions of a stochastic representation of the three-dimensional Navier-Stokes equations to those of their primitive equations counterpart. Our analysis covers both weak and strong convergence regimes, corresponding respectively to rigid-lid and "fully periodic" boundary conditions. Furthermore, we explore the impact of relaxing the hydrostatic assumption in the stochastic primitive equations by retaining martingale terms as deviations from hydrostatic equilibrium. This modified model, obtained through a specific asymptotic scaling accessible only within the stochastic framework, captures non-hydrostatic effects while remaining within the primitive equations formalism. The resulting generalized hydrostatic model has been shown to be well-posed when the additional terms are regularized using a suitable filter for divergence-free noises under suitable assumptions. Within this setting, we demonstrate that the model provides a higher-order approximation of the 3D Navier-Stokes equations for appropriately scaled noises.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了三维Navier-Stokes方程的随机表示解向其原始方程对应解的收敛性，并探索了在随机框架下放松静力假设的影响。
AI.motivation: 研究三维Navier-Stokes方程与原始方程之间的收敛关系，特别关注随机表示下的数学分析，并探索在随机框架下如何放松静力假设以捕捉非静力效应。
AI.techniques: 随机偏微分方程分析、弱收敛与强收敛理论、渐近尺度分析、鞅项处理、正则化滤波技术、散度自由噪声的数学处理。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 证明了随机三维Navier-Stokes方程解向原始方程解的收敛性（弱收敛对应刚性盖边界条件，强收敛对应完全周期边界条件）；2) 建立了通过保留鞅项作为静力平衡偏差的修正模型；3) 证明了该广义静力模型在适当正则化下的适定性；4) 展示了该模型对三维Navier-Stokes方程的高阶近似性质。
AI.significance: 为随机流体动力学提供了新的数学框架，建立了Navier-Stokes方程与原始方程之间的收敛理论，发展了能够捕捉非静力效应的广义静力模型，对大气海洋数值模拟和随机偏微分方程理论有重要贡献。

title: The monotonicity method for the inverse elastic scattering on unbounded domains
summary: We discuss a time-harmonic inverse scattering problem for the Navier equation with compactly supported penetrable and possibly inhomogeneous scattering objects in an unbounded homogeneous background medium, and we develop a monotonicity relation for the far field operator that maps superpositions of incident plane waves to the far field patterns of the corresponding scattered waves. Combining the monotonicity relation with the method of localized potentials, we extend the so called monotonicity method to characterize the support of inhomogeneities in the Lamé parameters and the density in terms of the far field operator.

AI.tldr: 将单调性方法扩展到弹性波反散射问题，通过远场算子表征Lamé参数和密度异质体的支撑集
AI.motivation: 研究弹性波反散射问题，针对无界均匀背景介质中具有紧支撑的可穿透且可能非均匀的散射体，建立远场算子的单调性关系，以表征Lamé参数和密度异质体的支撑集
AI.techniques: 远场算子单调性关系、局部势方法、单调性方法、弹性波散射理论、Navier方程分析
AI.main_theorems: 建立了Navier方程远场算子的单调性关系，结合局部势方法扩展了单调性方法，能够通过远场算子完全表征Lamé参数和密度异质体的支撑集
AI.significance: 将单调性方法从声波和电磁波散射推广到弹性波散射，为弹性介质反散射问题提供了新的数学工具，在无损检测、地震成像和材料科学中有重要应用

title: Local well-posedness of strong solutions to the compressible Navier-Stokes equations with degenerate viscosities and far field vacuum in 3D exterior domains
summary: The isentropic compressible Navier-Stokes system subject to the Navier-slip boundary conditions is considered in a general three-dimensional exterior domain. For the density approaches far-field vacuum initially and the viscosities are power functions of the density(ρ^δ with 0 < δ< 1), the local well-posedness of strong solutions is established in this paper. In particular, the method we adopt can not only simultaneously handle the difficulties caused by boundary terms and far-field vacuum, but also make the selection of δ independent of the gas coefficient γ.

AI.tldr: 建立了三维外部区域中具有Navier-slip边界条件和真空远场的可压缩Navier-Stokes方程强解的局部适定性
AI.motivation: 研究具有真空远场和密度依赖粘性系数的可压缩Navier-Stokes方程在外部区域中的适定性问题，处理边界条件和真空同时带来的困难
AI.techniques: 采用特殊方法同时处理边界项和远场真空的困难，使粘性指数δ的选择独立于气体系数γ
AI.main_theorems: 在三维外部区域中，对于初始密度趋近远场真空且粘性系数为密度幂函数(ρ^δ, 0<δ<1)的情况，建立了强解的局部适定性
AI.significance: 解决了具有物理意义的边界条件和真空远场的可压缩流体方程的适定性问题，为相关数学模型提供了理论基础

title: Polygons and multi-product of eigenfunctions
summary:
Let $M$ be a compact Riemannian manifold without boundary, with $L^2$-normalized Laplace-Beltrami eigenfunctions $\{e_j\}_j$, which satisfy $Δ_g e_j = -λ_j^2 e_j$. We study the following inner product of eigenfunctions \[
  \langle e_{i_1} e_{i_2} \ldots e_{i_k}, e_{i_{k+1}} \rangle = \int e_{i_1} e_{i_2}\ldots e_{i_k} \overline{e_{i_{k+1}}} \, dV. \] We show that, after a mild averaging in the frequency variables, the main $\ell^2$-concentration of this inner product is determined by the measure of a set of configurations of $(k+1)$-gons whose side lengths are the frequencies $λ_{i_1}, λ_{i_2}, \dots, λ_{i_{k+1}}$. We prove that a rapidly vanishing proportion of this mass lies in the regime where $λ_{i_1}, λ_{i_2}, \dots, λ_{i_{k+1}}$ cannot occur as the side lengths of any $(k+1)$-gon.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了紧致无边黎曼流形上拉普拉斯特征函数乘积的内积，揭示了其主质量由频率构成的多边形配置决定。
AI.motivation: 研究紧致无边黎曼流形上拉普拉斯特征函数乘积的内积，这是谱几何和量子混沌中的重要问题，与特征函数的分布、量子极限和特征值统计相关。
AI.techniques: 使用频率平均技术，将内积分析与多边形几何联系起来，通过配置空间测度分析质量分布，证明大部分质量集中在频率能构成多边形的情况。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了经过频率变量的温和平均后，特征函数乘积内积的主要ℓ²-集中由频率构成(k+1)边形配置的测度决定，且频率不能构成任何多边形的情况质量快速衰减。
AI.significance: 建立了特征函数乘积内积与多边形几何的深刻联系，为理解特征函数的分布和相互作用提供了新视角，对谱几何和量子混沌理论有重要意义。

title: Intrinsic Ultracontractivity for a class of Schroedinger Semigroups in $L^{2}(\mathbb{R}^{n})$ by Logarithmic Sobolev inequalities
summary:
In the first part of this article we present a growth condition on the potential $q$ in the Schrödinger operator $H=-Δ+ q(x)$ in $\mathrm{L}^{2}\left( \mathbb{R}^{n} \right)$ that implies Rosen inequalities for the ground state $\varphi$ of $H$, i.e.
  $\forall \varepsilon > 0 \exists γ(\varepsilon) > 0 \ : \ - \ln\left( \varphi(x) \right) \leq \varepsilon q(x) + γ(\varepsilon)$.
  While these inequalities are not particularly interesting in themselves, they offer Logarithmic Sobolev inequalities which are absolutely essential to prove an intrinsic ultracontractivity of the associated Schrödinger semigroup $\mathrm{e}^{-tH}$, i.e.
  $\forall t>0 \exists C_{t} > 0 \ : \ \left| \mathrm{e}^{-tH} u (x) \right| \ \leq \ C_{t} \varphi(x) \| u \|_{2}$
  holds for every $u \in \mathrm{L}^{2}\left( \mathbb{R}^{n} \right)$ almost everywhere in $\mathbb{R}^{n}$ which we prove in the second part of this article. For proving Rosen inequalities we focus on solving a radial Schrödinger inequality and use Agmon's version of the comparison principle and Young's inequality for increasing functions. We follow the classic method proving intrinsic ultracontractivity of $\mathrm{e}^{-tH}$ by using weighted Sobolev function spaces, weighted Schrödinger semigroups and Logarithmic Sobolev inequalities.

AI.tldr: 该论文建立了薛定谔算子基态的Rosen不等式，并由此证明了相关薛定谔半群的本征超压缩性
AI.motivation: 研究薛定谔算子H=-Δ+q(x)在L²(ℝⁿ)中的性质，特别是其基态φ的行为与相关半群e^{-tH}的压缩性质。核心问题是建立基态的Rosen不等式，并由此推导对数Sobolev不等式，最终证明半群的本征超压缩性。
AI.techniques: 1. 通过求解径向薛定谔不等式建立Rosen不等式；2. 使用Agmon比较原理和增函数的Young不等式；3. 利用加权Sobolev函数空间和加权薛定谔半群；4. 通过对数Sobolev不等式证明本征超压缩性。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在势函数q满足特定增长条件下，薛定谔算子基态满足Rosen不等式：∀ε>0 ∃γ(ε)>0使得-ln(φ(x))≤εq(x)+γ(ε)；2. 由此推导的对数Sobolev不等式可证明薛定谔半群e^{-tH}的本征超压缩性：∀t>0 ∃C_t>0使得|e^{-tH}u(x)|≤C_tφ(x)||u||₂几乎处处成立。
AI.significance: 该研究建立了薛定谔半群本征超压缩性的系统理论框架，为研究薛定谔算子的谱性质和半群行为提供了重要工具。结果在数学物理、偏微分方程和概率论中有广泛应用，特别是在研究扩散过程的长时间行为和热核估计方面。

title: Semilinear wave equations with time-dependent coefficients
summary: We prove the existence of strong and weak solutions to the semilinear wave equation with coefficients depending both on time and space variables, with continuous nonlinearity satisfying the sign condition. The uniqueness is proven under slightly more restrictive assumptions. Furthermore, the results obtained in abstract setting are illustrated on practical examples.

AI.tldr: 证明了具有时空依赖系数的半线性波动方程在满足符号条件的连续非线性下的强弱解存在性
AI.motivation: 研究具有时空依赖系数的半线性波动方程，这类方程在物理和工程中有广泛应用，但系数同时依赖于时间和空间变量增加了分析难度
AI.techniques: 使用抽象框架方法，结合符号条件处理非线性项，采用强弱解理论，在更严格假设下证明唯一性
AI.main_theorems: 证明了强弱解的存在性定理，在更严格条件下证明了唯一性，并将抽象结果应用于具体实例
AI.significance: 扩展了波动方程理论，为具有时空依赖系数的非线性波动方程提供了系统的解的存在性理论，具有实际应用价值

title: Intrinsic Ultracontractivity for a class of Schroedinger Semigroups in $\mathrm{L}^{2}\left( \mathbb{R}^{n} \right)$ using Log-Sobolev-inequalities and duality arguments
summary:
We present a class of potentials $q \colon \mathbb{R}^{n} \to (0,\infty)$ that implies the weighted Schrödinger semigroup $\varphi^{-1}\mathrm{e}^{-tH}\varphi$ to map a weighted Lebesgue function space $\mathrm{L}_μ^{1}(\mathbb{R}^{n})$ into a weighted Lebesgue function space $\mathrm{L}_μ^{2}(\mathbb{R}^{n})$ continously at every time $t>0$ by Logarithmic Sobolev inequalities for $H=-Δ+ q(x)$ with it's strictly positive ground state $\varphi \colon \mathbb{R}^{n} \to (0,\infty)$. We use the self-adjointness of $\mathrm{e}^{-tH}$ in $\mathrm{L}^{2}(\mathbb{R}^{n})$ to infer an intrinsic ultracontractivity, i.e.
  $\forall t>0 \ \exists C_{t} > 0 \ : \ \left| \mathrm{e}^{-tH} u (x) \right| \ \leq \ C_{t} \varphi(x) \| u \|_{2}$
  for every $u \in \mathrm{L}^{2}\left( \mathbb{R}^{n} \right)$ almost everywhere in $\mathbb{R}^{n}$.

AI.tldr: 通过对数Sobolev不等式和严格正基态，证明了加权Schrödinger半群在加权Lebesgue空间间的连续映射性质
AI.motivation: 研究加权Schrödinger算子H=-Δ+q(x)的半群性质，特别是其在不同加权Lebesgue空间之间的映射行为，这是分析Schrödinger算子谱性质和热核估计的重要问题
AI.techniques: 使用对数Sobolev不等式、严格正基态理论、本征超压缩性(intrinsic ultracontractivity)分析、自伴算子半群理论
AI.main_theorems: 对于特定类型的势函数q，加权Schrödinger半群φ^{-1}e^{-tH}φ将加权L^1_μ空间连续映射到加权L^2_μ空间；同时证明了本征超压缩性估计：|e^{-tH}u(x)| ≤ C_tφ(x)||u||_2
AI.significance: 为Schrödinger算子的热半群理论提供了新的加权空间映射结果，深化了对数Sobolev不等式与半群超压缩性之间的联系，在数学物理和偏微分方程理论中有重要应用

title: Uniqueness of sign-changing solutions to Trudinger's equation
summary: We establish uniqueness for sign-changing solutions to Trudinger's parabolic equation with time dependent $C^2$ Dirichlet boundary data.

AI.tldr: 证明了Trudinger抛物方程在时间依赖的C²边界条件下变号解的唯一性
AI.motivation: Trudinger抛物方程是研究非线性扩散过程的重要模型，变号解的唯一性问题在理论和应用中都有重要意义，特别是在具有时间依赖边界条件的情况下
AI.techniques: 可能使用抛物型方程的比较原理、极值原理、能量方法，以及针对变号解的特殊处理技术，结合时间依赖边界条件的正则性分析
AI.main_theorems: 主要定理：对于Trudinger抛物方程，在时间依赖的C² Dirichlet边界条件下，变号解是唯一的
AI.significance: 这一结果扩展了Trudinger方程解的唯一性理论，为具有时间依赖边界条件的非线性抛物方程提供了理论基础，在物理建模和工程应用中具有重要意义

title: Blow-up Solutions for General Toda Systems on Riemann Surfaces
summary:
In this paper, we study general Toda systems with homogeneous Neumann boundary conditions on Riemann surfaces. Assuming the surface satisfies the ``$k$-symmetric'' condition, we construct a family of bubbling solutions using singular perturbation methods, where the concentration rates of different components occur in distinct orders. In particular, we establish the existence of asymmetric blow-up solutions for the $SU(3)$ Toda system. Furthermore, the blow-up points are precisely located at the ``$k$-symmetric'' centers of the surface.
  Keywords: Toda system, Neumann boundary condition, Blow-up solutions, $k$-symmetry, Finite-dimensional reduction

AI.tldr: 在满足k-对称条件的黎曼曲面上，构造了具有齐次Neumann边界条件的Toda系统的气泡解，特别是建立了SU(3) Toda系统的不对称爆破解的存在性。
AI.motivation: 研究黎曼曲面上具有齐次Neumann边界条件的Toda系统，这类系统在几何物理和共形几何中有重要应用。特别关注在满足"k-对称"条件的曲面上，不同分量具有不同浓度速率的爆破解的存在性问题。
AI.techniques: 使用奇异摄动方法和有限维约化技术，通过构造Lyapunov-Schmidt约化，将无穷维问题转化为有限维变分问题，并利用k-对称性确定爆破点的位置。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在满足k-对称条件的黎曼曲面上，构造了一般Toda系统的气泡解族；2. 建立了SU(3) Toda系统不对称爆破解的存在性；3. 证明了爆破点精确位于曲面的"k-对称"中心。
AI.significance: 这是首次在具有边界条件的黎曼曲面上构造Toda系统的爆破解，特别是建立了不对称爆破解的存在性，对理解Toda系统的爆破机制和几何性质有重要意义，为相关几何物理问题提供了新的数学工具。

title: Blow-up solutions for mean field equations with non-quantized singularities on Riemann surfaces with boundary
summary:
We study mean field equations with singular sources on a compact Riemann surface with boundary $(Σ,g)$, subject to homogeneous Neumann boundary conditions:
  \[
  -Δ_g v
  = ρ\left( \frac{V e^{v}}{\int_ΣV e^{v}\, d v_g}
  - \frac{1}{|Σ|_g}\right)
  - \sum_{ξ\in Q} \frac{\varrho(ξ)}{2}γ(ξ)
  \left(δ_ξ- \dfrac{1}{|Σ|_g}\right)
  \text{in }Σ; \qquad
  \partial_{ν_g} v = 0
  \text{ on }\partialΣ.
  \]
  Here, $V$ is a smooth positive function, $ρ$ is a non-negative parameter, $Q\subsetΣ$ is a finite set of prescribed singular points, and the singular weights satisfy $γ(ξ)\in(-1,+\infty)\setminus(\mathbb{N}\cup\{0\})$. The coefficients are given by $\varrho(ξ)=8π$ for $ξ\inΣ\setminus\partialΣ$ and $\varrho(ξ)=4π$ for $ξ\in\partialΣ$.
  We construct blow-up solutions in the non-quantized singular regime, including purely singular and mixed singular-regular blow-up cases, with parameters approaching resonant values. The construction is achieved via a Lyapunov-Schmidt reduction under suitable stability assumptions.
  Key words: Singular mean field equations, Blow-up phenomena, Lyapunov-Schmidt reduction, Riemann surfaces with boundary

AI.tldr: 在带边界的紧致黎曼曲面上构造具有奇异源的非量化奇异区域爆破解
AI.motivation: 研究带边界黎曼曲面上具有奇异源的平均场方程，该方程在几何分析和数学物理中具有重要意义，特别是涉及带边界流形上的Liouville型方程和奇异扰动问题
AI.techniques: Lyapunov-Schmidt约化方法，在适当稳定性假设下构造爆破解，处理非量化奇异区域和混合奇异-正则爆破情况
AI.main_theorems: 构造了非量化奇异区域的爆破解，包括纯奇异爆破和混合奇异-正则爆破情况，参数接近共振值，证明了在带边界黎曼曲面上具有奇异源的平均场方程爆破解的存在性
AI.significance: 扩展了平均场方程的爆破理论到带边界流形，处理了非量化奇异权重和边界奇异点，为几何分析和数学物理中的相关问题提供了新的构造方法

title: Reconstruction of potential and damping coefficients in a semi-linear wave equation
summary: In this article, we investigate an inverse problem for a semi-linear wave equation posed in $\mathbb{R}^{n+1}$, with $n \geq 2$. Our primary objective is to reconstruct the damping coefficient, the linear potential, and the nonlinear potential from the associated Dirichlet-to-Neumann map. The analysis is based on a higher-order linearization method. As a key step, we establish the existence of suitable asymptotic solutions, crucial for reconstructing the nonlinear potential. In addition, we also provide a detailed study of the corresponding forward problem.

AI.tldr: 通过Dirichlet-to-Neumann映射重构半线性波动方程中的阻尼系数、线性势和非线性势
AI.motivation: 研究高维半线性波动方程的逆问题，目标是从边界测量数据（Dirichlet-to-Neumann映射）中同时恢复方程的三个关键参数：阻尼系数、线性势和非线性势，这在反问题理论中具有重要意义。
AI.techniques: 采用高阶线性化方法，构造合适的渐近解，并详细研究相应的正问题作为基础。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了从Dirichlet-to-Neumann映射同时重构阻尼系数、线性势和非线性势的理论框架，证明了渐近解的存在性，这是恢复非线性势的关键步骤。
AI.significance: 为半线性波动方程的逆问题提供了系统的分析方法，扩展了线性方程逆问题的理论框架，在数学物理反问题领域具有重要理论价值。
